content.headline: Discover a premium path to curated reward offers.
content.subtitle: Reward Center presents a polished, trustworthy experience for accessing eligible promotional offers with clear terms, fast navigation, and privacy-first behavior.
content.heroCardCopy: Minimal distractions, transparent messaging, and a focused CTA create a conversion-friendly journey.

features.title: Conversion-focused hero
features.description: A luxury visual first impression with one clear next step and flexible copy.

features.title: Trust infrastructure
features.description: Privacy pages, accessible structure, and secure redirect handling support compliance and confidence.

features.title: Reusable system
features.description: The same project can power unlimited CPA campaigns by changing settings instead of editing HTML.

benefits.title: Professional presentation
benefits.description: Luxury-style visuals and precise spacing create a premium experience.

benefits.title: Compliant by design
benefits.description: Clear language, policy pages, and controlled redirect handling support safer use.

benefits.title: Fast and focused
benefits.description: Optimized structure, lightweight interactions, and mobile-first layouts keep the journey smooth.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: Visitors see the core promise instantly and understand the value quickly.

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.description: Supporting content reassures them with benefits, features, and a calm experience.

steps.title: Continue
steps.description: A transparent redirect leads them to the configured offer destination.

faq.question: Can this page be configured for another offer?
faq.answer: Yes. The experience is designed to adapt by changing a single configuration set instead of editing the HTML.

faq.question: Does it support tracking?
faq.answer: Yes. Pixel IDs, analytics, tag manager, clarity, and custom scripts can all be configured.

faq.question: Is it mobile optimized?
faq.answer: Yes. The layout is mobile-first and responsive across phones, tablets, and desktops.

content.privacyText: We collect only the information needed to operate the site experience, consent preferences, and optional analytics. You can manage your choice from the cookie banner.
content.termsText: This landing platform is intended for lawful promotional use. You agree to use the site in a compliant and responsible manner.
content.ctaTitle: Ready to direct visitors with confidence?
content.ctaCopy: Use the dashboard to update branding, content, tracking, and the destination URL in one place.

seo.title: Reward Center
seo.description: A premium reusable CPA landing platform with a configurable dashboard and trusted conversion flow.

security.csp: default-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' data: https:; script-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-ancestors 'none'
